headline: As Volatility Rumbles Through the Market, This 4.6% Yielding Residential Giant Is a Bulletproof Haven for Retirees
summary: Market volatility has rattled income investors as the interest rate path stays murky, and casual money has fled residential REITs over fears that higher-for-longer rates will crush floating-debt portfolios. I think the bears are missing the point on UDR (NYSE:UDR). Shelter is non-discretionary, mortgage rates are pricing buyers out of single-family homes, and UDR’s Q1 ... As Volatility Rumbles Through the Market, This 4.6% Yielding Residential Giant Is a Bulletproof Haven for Retirees
